song.title: How Great Thou Art
song.author: Stuart Hine
song.copyright: 1941, 1981 Stuart K. Hine, Manna Music, Inc
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Amaj7 A Amaj7 D O Lord, my God, when I, in _awesome wonder, .Dmaj7 Amaj7 E A Consider all the works Thy hands have made, .Amaj7 A Amaj7 D I see the stars, I hear the rolling thunder, .Dmaj7 Amaj7 E A Thy pow’r throughout the universe displayed.
[C] .Amaj7 A D A Then sings my soul, my savior God, to Thee, .Amaj7 Bm7 E A How great Thou art, how great Thou art. .Amaj7 A D A Then sings my soul, my savior God, to Thee, .Amaj7 Bm7 E A Amaj7 A How great Thou art, how great Thou art.
[V2] When through the woods and forest glades I wander, And hear the birds sing sweetly in the trees, When I look down from lofty mountain grandeur, And hear the brook and feel the gentle breeze.
[V3] But when I think, that God, His Son not sparing, Sent Him to die, I scarce can take it in, That on the cross, my burden gladly bearing, He bled and died to take away my sin.
[V4] When Christ shall come, with shouts of acclamation, And take me home, what joy shall fill my heart, Then I shall bow in humble adoration And there proclaim, “My God, how great Thou art.”
